data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_FerryUnavailabl: I beg your pardon?\nYou're looking for a ship?\pI'm sorry, the ferry service isn't\navailable at present...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_MayISeeYourTick: Hello, are you here for the ferry?\nMay I see your TICKET?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_NoTicket: {PLAYER} doesn't have the TICKET...\pI'm terribly sorry.\pYou must have a TICKET to board\nthe ferry.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_FlashTicketWher: {PLAYER} flashed the TICKET.\pPerfect! That's all you need!\pAnd where would you like to go?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailAnotherTime: Please sail with us another time!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_PleaseBoard: Please board the ferry and wait for\ndeparture.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_WhereWouldYouLi: Then, where would you like to go?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailorFerryUnav: Until they finish making the ferry, we\nsailors have nothing to do...\pI wish they'd get a move on, the folks\nat the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailorFerryAvai: The ferry S.S. TIDAL is finally in\noperation.\pThe folks at the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT\nmust've worked extra hard.\pWell, it's my turn to get busy now!
